---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: '[feat] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe it clearly.

## Proposed solution
Describe the solution you would like, including which module it would affect
(e.g. `crowd-model.js`, `navigator.js`, `pages/accessibility.html`).

## Alternatives considered
Any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Additional context
Links, screenshots, or references that support the request.
